resources.string: To enable this feature, Contact: i-TEK Support.

EDW006\nAirplane Mode is ON!
This may cause connectivity issues!
Please turn off the Airplane Mode and Retry.
EDW001\nPlease check your internet connection and try again.
EDW004\nUnable to connect web-server!\nConnection Timed Out!

EDW005\nUnable to read response data!
Please Retry.
Device Location is Off!\nPlease Turn on Device Location!
ED%s009\nBluetooth is Off!\nPlease Turn on Bluetooth!
Are you sure you want to Reset Password?
Old and New Passwords can not be same
Verifying with Server...\nPlease gather Picked tags...\nPlease wait...
Password length should be between 6 to 20

SERVER URL Not Configured.
Please Configure SERVER URL.
EDR010\nQuantity must be greater then 0.\nCan\'t Replenish.
EDR011\n&location;s are not available for Replenishment!\nPlease Re-Login or Contact Admin.
EDM011\n&location;s are not available for Movement!\nPlease Re-Login or Contact Admin.

This feature is Protected by Pin!
Please Enter the correct pin and verify to access.
Same Product!. Please select different Product for Comparison.
Press trigger or Click above Button to Start/Stop Encoding
Can\'t be greater then Balance Length
Multiple Printers are Paired! Please go to Bluetooth Setting & Pair a single Printer.
Printer Not Paired! Please go to Bluetooth Setting & Pair the Printer.
Printer Not On! Please check the Printer.
EDE042\nEncoding Failed!\nTag not supported for non standard encoding
EDE047\nEncoding Failed!\nTag not supported for non standard encoding
EDE054\nEncoding of Non-Std Barcode is Not Allowed for This Tag!
Please enter Encode Config: One-Many Qty.
To override, please enter a remark to continue\n

FIFO Rule:
An earlier stock item must be cleared as per FIFO compliance.

ED%s040\nReader Connection failed!
Please check the reader and retry.
Please click \'\' to view dashboard counts.
\'All\' location\'s inventory won’t be reflected in the stock. Do you want to continue?
"EDI010\nMax Limit Reached!\nPlease Upload/Discard data to continue..."
\'All\' location\'s inventory uploads won’t be reflected in the stock.
Do you want to cancel this session?

Canceling this process will discard the inventory data.
Do you want still to cancel?
Please keep picked products near reader for order completion.
Do you want to release this %s?

%s articles found but not Uploaded!
Do you want to release this %s?

%s articles found but not Uploaded!
Releasing this will discard the articles data.

Do you still want to release this %s?

%s articles found but not Uploaded!
Canceling this process will discard the articles data.
Do you want still to cancel?

%s articles found (%s decoded) but not Uploaded!
Canceling this process will discard the articles data.
Do you want still to cancel?

%s shortage articles found but not Uploaded!
Canceling this process will discard the found articles data.
Do you want still to cancel?
Are you sure you want to Upload?
Are you sure you want to Upload<?

You can choose to
Upload, Save or Discard data. ¬eDiscardData;

You can choose to
Save or Close this session.

You can choose to
Save or Discard data. ¬eDiscardData;

You can choose to
Upload or Discard data. ¬eDiscardData;
EDI025\nInventory Session has expired!\nAll data will be deleted.
EDE025\nEncoding Session has expired!\nAll data will be deleted.
EDO025\nDecoding Session has expired!\nAll data will be deleted.
Multiple brands not allowed for advance filters
Inventory count will be lost and cannot be recovered.\nDo you want to cancel this session?
Rescanning will delete existing data.\n Do you want to proceed?
EDN026\n%s &HU;s are pending for verification.\nPlease verify before proceeding.
EDN007\nThere is no &trip; scheduled for inward
&Trip; inventory will be lost and cannot be recovered.\nDo you want to cancel this session?
&Trip; is in Progress.\n can not go back.
EDO007\nThere is no &trip; scheduled for Outward
Do you want to cancel this session?

%s articles found but not Uploaded!
Canceling this process will discard the scanned articles data.
Do you want still to cancel?

Canceling this process will discard the scanned article data.
Do you want still to cancel?

There are few &trip;s which need
 action to be taken.
Completed : %s
In-Progress : %s
Pending : %s

Are you sure you want to cancel trip's processing?

Completed : %s
In-Progress : %s
Pending : %s
Please take appropriate actions on above &trip;s.
&Trip; is in Progress.\n Do you still want to go back?
EDN024\nQuantity matched. Manual processing not allowed.
EDN012\n&HU; Scan failed, please try again
EDN012\nProduct &barcode; Scan failed, please try again
EDN012\n&HU; Scan failed, please try again
EDN012\nProduct &barcode; Scan failed, please try again
EDN012\n&HU; Scan failed, please try again
Are you sure you want to %s this &HU; ?
Are you sure you want to accept this &HU; ?
Are you sure you want to reject this &HU; ?
%s scanned.\nAre you sure you want to add it?
%s scanned.\nAre you sure you want to set it?
EDN028\n(%s) &HU; not valid for this Store (%s)
EDU028\n(%s) &HU; not valid for this Store (%s)
EDN007\n No Article Available for %s this HU!
EDN007\n No &ean; Available for %s this HU!
EDN007\n Quantity is 0 for %s this HU!
Excess qty of an Unknown articles
Qty below the threshold level and article qty mismatch.
Process data will be lost and cannot be recovered. Do you want to cancel this session?
Click on below button or press trigger by keeping Tag near Reader to Return.
There is no scheduled &trip; available. Please connect with the server to fetch the &trip; data
Data sync will delete existing &trip; Data from the device..\nDo you want to continue?
Do you want to complete this trip?
Do you want to complete this &HU; (%s)?
No accepted &HU;s are found. You cannot complete the GRN.
&Trip; is in Progress.\nDo you still want to go back?
&Trip; data will be lost. Are you sure you want to delete this &trip; :%s?
&Trip; no : %s \nPreviously processed data will be lost.
Are you sure you want to remove this &trip; :%s from pending list?
Scan qty is less than &HU; Qty.
There is already one &HU; (%s) in process. Do you want to continue with the same HU?
Are you sure you want to Delete this %s?
ED%s0019\nMultiple tags found. Please keep only 1 tag near reader antenna.
ED%s0020\nTag was already picked and decoded.
Wrong item selected:%s\nSelect the correct item and retry.
Wrong item selected: %s\nNot Present in the list
ED%s0023\n&rfid; tag not encoded. Can\'t Pick.
ED%s0013\nEncoding not allowed. EAN (%s) not present in the product master.
You have Picked %s Tags. Do you want to delete them before starting Pick?
You have Picked %s Tags. Do you want to delete them?
There are already few pending &trip;s on the device.\nDo you want to continue with existing &trip;s or fetch the latest data from the server?
EDU010\n Quantity must be greater then 0.\nCan\'t Outward.
Are you sure you want to Mark this ean (%s) as Found ?
ED%s010\n Quantity must be greater then 0.\nCan\'t Proceed.
EDS010\n Quantity must be greater then 0.\nCan\'t Search.
Are you sure you want to mark this list as Completed?
Do you want to cancel this List Based Search?
Do you want to cancel this List Base Search?
Are you sure you want to delete this :%s from Picked List?

%s decoded but not Uploaded!
Canceling this process will discard the data.
Do you want still to cancel this List Based Search?
Do you want to cancel this Assortment Search?

Do you want to cancel this Unencoded Search?
All data will be discarded.

Do you want to cancel this Alien Search?
All data will be discarded.

Do you want to cancel this process?
All data will be discarded.
Do you want to cancel this %s?
Do you want to process the New List?\nPrevious List data will be removed.
Do you want to cancel this Ageing List Based Search?

%s for FIFO Date: %s.
Please keep them with you.
Those won't be reflected in FIFO Search or Chart.
Do you want to continue to Chart?

%s for FIFO Date: %s.
Please keep them with you.
Those won't be reflected in FIFO Search or Chart.
Do you want to cancel this FIFO Search and go back?
Do you want to cancel this FIFO Search?
Are you sure you want to Logout?
Are you sure you want to Reset Demo?
Are you sure you want to Set Stock to Default?
Are you sure you want to continue?
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this decoded tag (%s) from DB?¬eDiscardData;
Are you sure you want to complete?
Are you sure you want to rescan?\nThis will discard all previously scanned data and start a new scan.
Are you sure you want to reject?\nDelivery Challan will be rejected discarding all the scanned data.
Do you want to complete this carton (%s) ?
Are you sure you want to accept?
Are you sure you want to reject ?
Scan again? Scanned data will be discarded.
Do you want to Complete this Batch?
Do you want to Complete this Batch?

Do you want to cancel this batch?
All data will be discarded.
Do you want to cancel this batch?
%s does not exist!\nDo you want to proceed with manual input?
%s is not associated with the current %s
Do you want to change this %s No. : %s ?
Do you want to change this existing %s No. : %s ?
Do you want to change this auto-generated %s No. : %s ?
%s is in Progress.\nDo you still want to go back?
Do you want to complete this %s ?
Invalid %s. Can not be same as %s
Are you sure you want to %s this %s ?
Do you want to proceed with exception?
Wrong item scanned: %s\nRemove the item and retry.
%s Storage Limit Reached.\nPlease check your internet connection\nbefore processing further.
ED%s0020\nTag was already picked in Carton: %s
EDO042\nDecoding Failed!\nTag not supported for non standard encoding
Are you sure you want to Decode?
Copyright \u24B8 2025 Infotek Software & System (P) Ltd.\nAll Rights Reserved.
Quick Action is a small android library for easy create Tooltips with some action or just as decoration. Original by http://www.londatiga.net/
